title: zieria fraseri subsp. fraseri
intro: Zieria fraseri subsp. fraseri, also known as Fraser's Zieria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutosaceae, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Zieria fraseri subsp. fraseri can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
